prompt: Where is my order #12345?
ground_truth: I can help you track your order. Please provide your order number and I'll check the current status and estimated delivery date.

prompt: How long does standard shipping take?
ground_truth: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Expedited shipping options are available at checkout for faster delivery.

prompt: What is your return policy?
ground_truth: You can return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Some restrictions apply to certain product categories.

prompt: Do you offer free shipping?
ground_truth: Yes, we offer free standard shipping on orders over $50. Orders under $50 have a flat shipping fee of $5.99.

prompt: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
ground_truth: If your order hasn't shipped yet, we can update the shipping address. Please contact us immediately with your order number and new address.

prompt: How do I cancel my order?
ground_truth: You can cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it through your account dashboard. After that, please contact customer service for assistance.

prompt: Is this product available in blue?
ground_truth: I can check product availability for you. Please provide the product name or SKU, and I'll let you know which colors are currently in stock.

prompt: When will the item be back in stock?
ground_truth: I can check the restock date for you. Please provide the product name or SKU, and I'll give you the expected availability date.

prompt: How do I apply a discount code?
ground_truth: You can enter your discount code at checkout in the 'Promo Code' field before completing your purchase. The discount will be applied to your order total.

prompt: How long does a refund take to process?
ground_truth: Refunds are typically processed within 5-7 business days after we receive your return. The credit will appear in your account within 3-5 business days after processing.

prompt: Can I track my return?
ground_truth: Yes, once you ship your return using the provided label, you'll receive a tracking number. You can monitor the return status in your account dashboard.

prompt: Do you ship internationally?
ground_truth: Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. International shipping costs and delivery times vary by destination. You can see options at checkout.

prompt: How do I create an account?
ground_truth: You can create an account by clicking 'Sign Up' at the top of our website. You'll need to provide an email address and create a password.

prompt: I forgot my password, how do I reset it?
ground_truth: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your email address. We'll send you a password reset link within a few minutes.

prompt: Can I save items for later?
ground_truth: Yes, you can add items to your Wishlist or Save for Later list. These items will be saved to your account for future purchase.

prompt: What sizes do you have for this shirt?
ground_truth: I can check size availability for you. Please provide the product name or SKU, and I'll let you know which sizes are currently in stock.

prompt: Do you have a size guide?
ground_truth: Yes, each product page has a size guide link near the size selector. This provides detailed measurements to help you choose the right size.

prompt: Can I exchange an item for a different size?
ground_truth: Yes, you can exchange items for a different size within 30 days. Start a return through your account and select 'Exchange' to specify the new size you need.

prompt: Is there a warranty on this product?
ground_truth: Warranty information varies by product. You can find specific warranty details on the product page under the 'Product Information' section.

prompt: How do I contact customer service?
ground_truth: You can contact us via email at support@example.com, phone at 1-800-XXX-XXXX (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm EST), or live chat available on our website.

prompt: Do you offer gift wrapping?
ground_truth: Yes, gift wrapping is available for most items. You can select this option at checkout for an additional $4.99 per item.

prompt: Can I buy a gift card?
ground_truth: Yes, we offer digital and physical gift cards in various denominations from $25 to $500. You can purchase them on our Gift Cards page.

prompt: How do I redeem a gift card?
ground_truth: Enter your gift card code at checkout in the 'Gift Card' field. The balance will be applied to your order total. You can also check your gift card balance on our website.

prompt: Do you have a loyalty program?
ground_truth: Yes, our rewards program lets you earn points on every purchase. Points can be redeemed for discounts on future orders. Sign up for free on our Rewards page.

prompt: Can I get expedited shipping?
ground_truth: Yes, we offer 2-day and overnight shipping options. You can select these at checkout. Note that expedited shipping is not available for all items or locations.

prompt: My order is late, where is it?
ground_truth: I apologize for the delay. Please provide your order number and I'll track your package and provide an updated delivery estimate.

prompt: Can I pick up my order in store?
ground_truth: Yes, buy online, pick up in store is available at participating locations. Select this option at checkout and we'll notify you when your order is ready.

prompt: Do you price match?
ground_truth: Yes, we offer price matching for identical items from authorized retailers. Contact customer service within 14 days of purchase with proof of the lower price.

prompt: Are your products authentic?
ground_truth: Yes, all products sold on our site are 100% authentic. We source directly from manufacturers and authorized distributors.

prompt: Can I leave a product review?
ground_truth: Yes, you can leave reviews for products you've purchased. Go to the product page and click 'Write a Review'. Your feedback helps other customers.

prompt: How do I update my email address?
ground_truth: You can update your email address in your account settings under 'Profile Information'. You may need to verify the new email address.

prompt: Can I order over the phone?
ground_truth: Yes, you can place orders by calling our customer service line at 1-800-XXX-XXXX during business hours (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm EST).

prompt: What if I received the wrong item?
ground_truth: I apologize for the error. Please contact us with your order number and photos of the item received. We'll send the correct item and arrange a return at no cost to you.

prompt: Do you offer student discounts?
ground_truth: Yes, we offer a 15% student discount. Verify your student status through our Student Discount page to receive your unique discount code.

prompt: Can I combine multiple discount codes?
ground_truth: Unfortunately, only one discount code can be applied per order. The system will automatically apply whichever code gives you the best savings.

prompt: Is my payment information secure?
ground_truth: Yes, we use industry-standard SSL encryption to protect your payment information. We never store your full credit card details on our servers.

prompt: How do I unsubscribe from emails?
ground_truth: You can unsubscribe from marketing emails by clicking the 'Unsubscribe' link at the bottom of any email, or manage your preferences in your account settings.

prompt: What is your privacy policy?
ground_truth: Our privacy policy details how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. You can read the full policy on our Privacy Policy page.

prompt: Can I chat with a live agent?
ground_truth: Yes, live chat is available on our website Monday through Friday, 9am-6pm EST. Click the chat icon in the bottom right corner to start a conversation.

prompt: Do you have a mobile app?
ground_truth: Yes, our mobile app is available for iOS and Android. Download it from the App Store or Google Play to shop easily on your phone.

prompt: What are your holiday shipping deadlines?
ground_truth: Holiday shipping deadlines vary by destination and shipping method. Please check our Shipping Information page for current cutoff dates to ensure delivery before the holidays.

prompt: Can I pre-order upcoming products?
ground_truth: Yes, pre-orders are available for select upcoming products. You'll see a 'Pre-Order' button on eligible items. Your card will be charged when the item ships.

prompt: How do I know if an item is on sale?
ground_truth: Sale items are marked with a 'Sale' badge and show both the original and discounted price. You can also browse all current sales in our Sales section.

prompt: What is your price adjustment policy?
ground_truth: If an item you purchased goes on sale within 14 days, contact us for a price adjustment. We'll refund the difference to your original payment method.

prompt: Can I return sale items?
ground_truth: Yes, sale items can be returned following our standard 30-day return policy, unless marked as 'Final Sale'. Final sale items cannot be returned.

prompt: Do you offer bulk discounts?
ground_truth: Yes, we offer discounts on bulk orders for certain items. Contact our business sales team at business@example.com for a quote on large quantity orders.

prompt: How do I track my order?
ground_truth: You'll receive a tracking number via email once your order ships. You can also track your order by logging into your account and viewing your order history.

prompt: Can I modify my order after placing it?
ground_truth: You can modify your order within 1 hour of placing it through your account dashboard. After that, please contact customer service as soon as possible.

prompt: What if my discount code isn't working?
ground_truth: Discount codes may have expiration dates or specific terms. Check the code's details and ensure your cart meets the requirements. Contact us if you're still having issues.

prompt: Do you offer assembly services?
ground_truth: Assembly services are available for select furniture items. You'll see this option on the product page if available for an additional fee.

prompt: What is your environmental policy?
ground_truth: We're committed to sustainability. Learn more about our eco-friendly practices, packaging, and carbon offset programs on our Sustainability page.

prompt: Can I request a catalog?
ground_truth: Yes, you can request a free catalog through our website. Fill out the catalog request form with your mailing address and we'll send one within 2-3 weeks.

prompt: Do you offer custom orders?
ground_truth: Custom orders are available for select products. Contact our customer service team to discuss your customization needs and get a quote.

prompt: How do I report a problem with my order?
ground_truth: Please contact customer service with your order number and a description of the issue. We'll work quickly to resolve any problems with your order.

prompt: Can I purchase items from your store if I'm outside the US?
ground_truth: Yes, we ship internationally to most countries. Shipping costs, delivery times, and available payment methods may vary by location.

prompt: What are your business hours?
ground_truth: Our website is available 24/7. Customer service is available Monday-Friday 9am-6pm EST, and Saturday 10am-4pm EST.

prompt: Do you have physical store locations?
ground_truth: Yes, we have retail locations in several cities. Use our Store Locator to find the nearest store, hours, and directions.

prompt: Can I return items purchased in-store to an online order?
ground_truth: Yes, items purchased in our retail stores can be returned through our online return process, and vice versa. Keep your receipt for easier processing.

prompt: What happens if my package is lost?
ground_truth: If your package shows as delivered but you didn't receive it, contact us immediately. We'll investigate with the carrier and arrange a replacement or refund.

prompt: Can I schedule a delivery time?
ground_truth: For most shipments, specific delivery time scheduling isn't available. However, large items may offer delivery windows. Check your shipping confirmation for details.

prompt: Do you offer financing options?
ground_truth: Yes, we offer financing through our payment partner for purchases over $500. Apply at checkout to see if you qualify for monthly payment plans.

prompt: How do I check my order status?
ground_truth: Log into your account and go to 'Order History' to see the current status of all your orders, including tracking information for shipped items.

prompt: Can I add items to an existing order?
ground_truth: Unfortunately, you cannot add items to an order that's already been placed. You'll need to place a separate order for additional items.

prompt: What brands do you carry?
ground_truth: We carry a wide variety of brands across different categories. Visit our Brands page to see our complete list of available brands.

prompt: Do you have a clearance section?
ground_truth: Yes, check our Clearance section for deeply discounted items. These are typically last season's styles or overstock items with limited quantities.

prompt: Can I see product dimensions before buying?
ground_truth: Yes, product dimensions are listed on each product page under the 'Specifications' or 'Product Details' section.

prompt: How do I care for this product?
ground_truth: Care instructions are provided on the product page under 'Care Instructions'. You'll also receive care information with your order.

prompt: Do you offer gift receipts?
ground_truth: Yes, you can request a gift receipt at checkout. Gift receipts show the item but hide pricing information for the recipient.

prompt: What if I have an allergy concern about a product?
ground_truth: Product ingredients and materials are listed on each product page. If you have specific allergy concerns, contact customer service for detailed information.

prompt: Can I backorder out-of-stock items?
ground_truth: Backordering is available for select items. If available, you'll see a 'Backorder' option on the product page with an estimated availability date.

prompt: Do you offer installation services?
ground_truth: Installation services are available for certain products like appliances and furniture. Check the product page or contact us for installation options and pricing.

prompt: How do I know my size?
ground_truth: Use our size guides available on each product page. If you're between sizes, we generally recommend sizing up. You can also read customer reviews for fit feedback.

prompt: Can I get a copy of my receipt?
ground_truth: Yes, you can access your receipt anytime by logging into your account and viewing your order history. You can also request a copy via email from customer service.

prompt: What if the item is cheaper elsewhere?
ground_truth: We offer price matching with authorized retailers. Submit a price match request with proof of the lower price within 14 days of purchase for a refund of the difference.

prompt: Do you sell gift boxes?
ground_truth: Yes, gift boxes and gift bags are available for purchase separately, or you can add gift wrapping to your order at checkout.

prompt: What's the status of my refund request?
ground_truth: I can help you check your refund status. Please provide your order number and I'll look up the current status of your refund request.

prompt: Do you ship to P.O. boxes?
ground_truth: Yes, we ship to P.O. boxes for most items. However, some large items or items requiring signature may not be eligible for P.O. box delivery.

prompt: How do I write a product review?
ground_truth: To write a product review, go to the product page and click the 'Write a Review' button. You'll need to be logged in and have purchased the item to leave a verified review.
